lesson.menu_desc: I would like to offer & comparatives -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Negotiation Basics -- Making Offers
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 16 -- Negotiation Basics: Making Offers

listenings.text: Good morning, Robert. Thank you for coming to talk about the deal. I have a clear proposal for you. Our budget is ready, and I would like to offer you a good price for the aircraft. This model is cheaper than the old one, and it is also faster and safer. I can also give you a small discount this month. Please look at the numbers, and tell me what you think. I am happy to negotiate the terms with you today.

Hello, this is Robert. Thank you for your offer. I read the proposal, and the price is good. But I have a counter idea. What about a bigger discount? My budget is smaller this year, so a lower price is better for me. The aircraft is great, and the terms are fair. If we agree on the price, I am ready to accept the deal today. Let us negotiate and close this together. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: First, Karina welcomed Robert and said she had a proposal. Then she made an offer with a good price. Next, she said the new aircraft is cheaper than the old one. After that, Robert asked for a bigger discount. Finally, they agreed on the terms and accepted the deal together.
